Classic graphs, repainted

Source: vignettes/articles/classic-graphs.Rmd
classic-graphs.Rmd

These examples take familiar R graphics and redraw them through mypaintr. They use only base R, ggplot2, and the package itself.

Developed by David Hugh-Jones.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
